heading: Duty on articles
label: 1421e Duty on articles
text: All articles coming into the United States from Guam shall be subject to or exempt from duty as provided for in section 1301a of title 19.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , . See General Headnote 3(a) under , Customs Duties.Section 1301a of title 19Pub. L. 87–456, title III, § 301(a)76 Stat. 75section 1202 of Title 19May 24, 1962
Amendments1954—Act , subjected Guam to the general provision for importations from insular possessions contained in .Sept. 1, 1954section 1301a of title 19

Effective Date of 1954 Amendment, , provided that:Act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1213, title VI, § 60168 Stat. 1141“Titles II, III, IV, and VI of this Act [enacting , Customs Duties, amending sections 1421e and 1644 of this title and sections 160, 161, 1001, and 1201 of Title 19] shall be effective on and after the thirtieth day following the date of the enactment of this Act []”.section 1301a of Title 19Sept. 1, 1954
